description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated figure, likely of religious or historical significance, positioned on a rectangular base with an ornate, rounded backrest. The figure is rendered in a meditative pose, with hands held together at chest level, and detailed facial features including stylized hair and a serene expression. The backrest is intricately carved, featuring decorative motifs that frame the figure and add depth to the composition. The sculpture appears to be made from a single block of stone or similar material, with a weathered, earthy surface texture. The base is simple and geometric, contrasting with the elaborate carving of the upper portion. The overall form is solid and monumental, suggesting it is intended as a permanent installation.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a seated, meditative figure with ornate carvings on a rectangular base and rounded backrest. The surface is earthy and textured, with intricate details on the figure and surrounding motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seated figure, hands together, with detailed facial features and ornate backrest carvings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the thickness of the backrest, and the depth of the carving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, mostly unadorned back of the sculpture and the rounded top of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the figure's profile and the sculpted details of the backrest.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure in meditative pose
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a plinth, suggesting an indoor or protected environment such as a museum or gallery.
